name: Swiper 3D — Coverflow & Cube Carousel
description: 3D Coverflow and Cube carousel with touch support. Add class swiper-3d-coverflow or swiper-3d-cube to a .swiper container.
head:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.css" />
<style>
  .swiper-3d-coverflow { padding: 2rem 0 3rem !important; }
  .swiper-3d-coverflow .swiper-slide { width: 280px; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); }
  .swiper-3d-cube .swiper-slide { border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@11/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('.swiper-3d-coverflow').forEach(function(el) {
      new Swiper(el, { effect: 'coverflow', grabCursor: true, centeredSlides: true, slidesPerView: 'auto',
        coverflowEffect: { rotate: 40, stretch: 0, depth: 140, modifier: 1, slideShadows: true },
        loop: true, autoplay: { delay: 3500, disableOnInteraction: false } });
    });
    document.querySelectorAll('.swiper-3d-cube').forEach(function(el) {
      new Swiper(el, { effect: 'cube', grabCursor: true, loop: true,
        cubeEffect: { shadow: true, slideShadows: true, shadowOffset: 20, shadowScale: 0.94 },
        autoplay: { delay: 3000, disableOnInteraction: false } });
    });
  });
</script>
